itunes_results.name: Art of War — Sun Tzu (audiobook)
itunes_results.note: Static audiobook/ebook — not a daily lesson streak app, no gamification

itunes_results.name: Business Strategy — Sun Tzu
itunes_results.note: Business application of Sun Tzu — not historical military strategy education

daily_sun_tzu_strategy_streak.gap_note: The Art of War is the most-cited strategy text in history (13 chapters, 68 verses) yet no streak app breaks it down daily with historical battle examples applying each principle: Thermopylae, Cannae, the Mongol feigned retreats, Napoleon's central position doctrine. 20M readers of Sun Tzu but no app teaches the military context that makes the text meaningful.

itunes_results.name: WWII: Second World War History
itunes_results.note: Static reference app with maps — no daily streak, no learning curriculum, no gamification

itunes_results.name: History Channel
itunes_results.note: Video streaming app — not an educational streak app for WWII battles

daily_wwii_battles_streak.gap_note: WWII has 18.5M+ active Reddit community members and is the most-studied conflict in history yet no dedicated streak app exists. D-Day tide calculations, Midway codebreaking, Operation Market Garden's fatal bridge, the Eastern Front's scale (30M casualties) — each battle is a masterclass in logistics, intelligence, leadership under stress. Zero gamified daily education apps targeting this audience.

itunes_results.name: Total War app (CA companion)
itunes_results.note: Strategy game companion — not historical warfare education, no streak

itunes_results.name: Ancient History Encyclopedia
itunes_results.note: Static reference — no daily curriculum, no gamification

daily_ancient_warfare_streak.gap_note: Greek hoplite phalanx evolution, Roman manipular tactics replacing the phalanx, Macedonian sarissa pike formations at Gaugamela, Carthaginian cavalry superiority at Cannae, Roman testudo vs Parthian cataphracts at Carrhae — ancient warfare is the foundation of all military theory but has zero dedicated streak-format education app despite 18M+ community exposure.

itunes_results.name: Navy General Library Program
itunes_results.note: US Navy digital library — not a civilian educational streak app

itunes_results.name: Sea Battle (game)
itunes_results.note: Casual game — no historical content, no education

daily_naval_history_streak.gap_note: Naval history spans 3,000 years: Greek triremes at Salamis (480 BC), Spanish Armada's storm disaster (1588), Trafalgar's crossing the T maneuver (1805), Jutland's dreadnought tactics (1916), Midway's turning the Pacific War (1942). The Age of Sail alone has 250+ years of battle. No streak app systematically teaches naval history despite 18M+ combined community exposure.

itunes_results.name: CIA Museum app
itunes_results.note: Official CIA app — static content, no streak, limited scope

itunes_results.name: Spycraft (Smithsonian)
itunes_results.note: Museum companion — not a daily learning streak app

daily_cold_war_intelligence_streak.gap_note: Cold War intelligence history is among the most fascinating and accessible military-adjacent content: Berlin Tunnel (Operation Gold), the Cambridge Five, CIA's Project MKULTRA, KGB mole Aldrich Ames, the Cuban Missile Crisis back-channel negotiations, Soviet deception operations (maskirovka). Apple TV+'s Slow Horses and similar shows prove appetite. Zero streak apps in this niche despite 18M+ combined reach.

itunes_results.name: SOF Warrior Foundation
itunes_results.note: Charity/community app — not a historical education streak app

itunes_results.name: Special Ops Fitness
itunes_results.note: Workout app — fitness, not military history education

daily_special_operations_streak.gap_note: Special operations history is consistently among the most-read military nonfiction: British SAS founding (Stirling, 1941), OSS operations in occupied France, Operation Neptune Spear, Delta Force founding by Charlie Beckwith, SEAL Team 6's evolution, Israeli Unit 269's Entebbe rescue. No streak app teaches this material systematically despite massive audience interest and zero direct competition.

itunes_results.name: Military Theory (West Point)
itunes_results.note: Academic lecture series — not a gamified streak app for general audience

itunes_results.name: Strategy & Tactics (board game app)
itunes_results.note: Wargame app — no historical doctrine education, not educational streak format

daily_military_tactics_streak.gap_note: Military doctrine evolution is a teachable science: Greek oblique advance, Roman mobile defense, Napoleonic corps system enabling independent movement, German auftragstaktik (mission command), Soviet deep battle theory, US AirLand Battle doctrine. Each innovation solved a specific problem and changed warfare. Clausewitz's trinity, Jomini's principles, Boyd's OODA loop — zero streak app covers this intellectual lineage.

itunes_results.name: Siege Castle Builder (game)
itunes_results.note: Mobile game — no historical education content

itunes_results.name: Medieval Castle Defense (game)
itunes_results.note: Casual game — entertainment only, no historical curriculum

daily_siege_warfare_streak.gap_note: Siege warfare spans 4,000 years of engineering ingenuity: Assyrian assault ramps at Lachish, Roman circumvallation at Alesia, Byzantine Greek fire, trebuchet physics at medieval sieges, Vauban's revolutionary parallel trench approach (ending storming tactics), WWI trench warfare as failed siege on grand scale, modern urban warfare doctrine. No streak app teaches this engineering/tactical history.

itunes_results.name: Aviation History Pro
itunes_results.note: Aircraft encyclopedia — static reference, no curriculum, no streak mechanics

itunes_results.name: Air Force Museum app
itunes_results.note: Museum guide — location-specific, not a general education streak app

daily_air_power_history_streak.gap_note: Air power changed warfare more than any innovation since gunpowder: WWI aerial reconnaissance ending strategic surprise, the Fokker Scourge, Mitchell's battleship sinking demos, Douhet's strategic bombing theory, RAF Fighter Command's radar-integrated system at Battle of Britain, USAAF daylight precision bombing doctrine and its failures, strategic vs tactical air power debate still ongoing. 19M+ community reach, zero streak education apps.

itunes_results.name: Guerrilla Warfare by Che Guevara (ebook)
itunes_results.note: Static ebook — not an educational streak app, single text

itunes_results.name: Counterinsurgency (COIN) Manual (ebook)
itunes_results.note: Government manual as ebook — not gamified education

daily_guerrilla_warfare_streak.gap_note: Guerrilla warfare theory spans from Sun Tzu's indirect approach to Mao's three-phase insurgency model, Che's foco theory, Ho Chi Minh's people's war, IRA's cell structure, Hamas tunnels vs Israeli Iron Dome — asymmetric warfare is how most modern conflicts are actually fought. The counterinsurgency doctrine debate (FM 3-24 vs conventional escalation) is actively contested in military circles. No streak app educates on this despite 18.7M+ community exposure.
